title: RFC/Draft Element
description: An LLM-extracted structured element from an RFC or draft — a normative requirement, protocol element, security/privacy consideration, or design rationale. Placeholder schema; element extraction is a later phase.

document.description: Document id this element was extracted from. Either an RFC id ('rfc-9000') or a draft name ('draft-ietf-tls-esni').

kind.description: What kind of element this is.

summary.description: One- to three-sentence statement of the element, quoting or paraphrasing the source.

section.description: Section reference within the source document, e.g. '5.1.2'.

rfc2119_level.description: If a normative requirement, the RFC 2119 keyword used.

extracted_by.description: Tool or model that extracted this element.
